'''âj-k-t''' ('''kajakat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:netmind|netmind]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:netmind|netmind]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-k-t
|-
! Lemma
| kajakat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijakat|thijakat]] || [[word:jijakat|jijakat]] || [[word:shijakat|shijakat]] || [[word:kijakat|kijakat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujakat|thuthujakat]] || [[word:jujujakat|jujujakat]] || [[word:shushujakat|shushujakat]] || [[word:kukujakat|kukujakat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujakat|thujakat]] || [[word:jujakat|jujakat]] || [[word:shujakat|shujakat]] || [[word:kujakat|kujakat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujakat|thujakat]] || [[word:jujakat|jujakat]] || [[word:shujakat|shujakat]] || [[word:kujakat|kujakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejakat|thejakat]] || [[word:jejakat|jejakat]] || [[word:shejakat|shejakat]] || [[word:kejakat|kejakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojakat|thothojakat]] || [[word:jojojakat|jojojakat]] || [[word:shoshojakat|shoshojakat]] || [[word:kokojakat|kokojakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojakat|thojakat]] || [[word:jojakat|jojakat]] || [[word:shojakat|shojakat]] || [[word:kojakat|kojakat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojakat|thojakat]] || [[word:jojakat|jojakat]] || [[word:shojakat|shojakat]] || [[word:kojakat|kojakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjakat|thĂŠjakat]] || [[word:jĂŠjakat|jĂŠjakat]] || [[word:shĂŠjakat|shĂŠjakat]] || [[word:kĂŠjakat|kĂŠjakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajakat|thathajakat]] || [[word:jajajakat|jajajakat]] || [[word:shashajakat|shashajakat]] || [[word:kakajakat|kakajakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajakat|thajakat]] || [[word:jajakat|jajakat]] || [[word:shajakat|shajakat]] || [[word:kajakat|kajakat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajakat|thajakat]] || [[word:jajakat|jajakat]] || [[word:shajakat|shajakat]] || [[word:kajakat|kajakat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajakat|shajakat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajakat|goshajakat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajakat|gokishajakat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajakatnĂŒ|shajakatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajakatnknĂŒ|goshajakatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakatnĂŒ|gokishajakatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajakatshĂ«|shajakatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajakatnkshĂ«|goshajakatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajakatshĂ«|gokishajakatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakatro|shajakatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajakatnkro|goshajakatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakatro|gokishajakatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakatmu|shajakatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajakatnkmu|goshajakatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakatmu|gokishajakatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajakatsher|shajakatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajakatnksher|goshajakatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajakatsher|gokishajakatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajakatng|shajakatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajakatnkng|goshajakatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajakatng|gokishajakatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajakatya|shajakatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajakatnkya|goshajakatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajakatya|gokishajakatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajakatyam|shajakatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajakatnkyam|goshajakatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajakatyam|gokishajakatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajakatnĂŒshĂ«|shajakatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajakatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajakatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajakatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajakatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakatnĂŒro|shajakatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajakatnknĂŒro|goshajakatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakatnĂŒro|gokishajakatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakatnĂŒmu|shajakatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajakatnknĂŒmu|goshajakatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakatnĂŒmu|gokishajakatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajakatshĂ«nĂŒ|shajakatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajakatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajakatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajakatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakatshĂ«ro|shajakatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajakatnkshĂ«ro|goshajakatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakatshĂ«ro|gokishajakatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakatshĂ«mu|shajakatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajakatnkshĂ«mu|goshajakatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakatshĂ«mu|gokishajakatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajakatronĂŒ|shajakatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajakatnkronĂŒ|goshajakatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakatronĂŒ|gokishajakatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajakatroshĂ«|shajakatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajakatnkroshĂ«|goshajakatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajakatroshĂ«|gokishajakatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakatromu|shajakatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajakatnkromu|goshajakatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakatromu|gokishajakatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajakatmunĂŒ|shajakatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajakatnkmunĂŒ|goshajakatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakatmunĂŒ|gokishajakatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajakatmushĂ«|shajakatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajakatnkmushĂ«|goshajakatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajakatmushĂ«|gokishajakatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakatmuro|shajakatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajakatnkmuro|goshajakatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakatmuro|gokishajakatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|654f723}}
